name: ACADIA REALTY TRUST
summary: Acadia Realty Trust (AKR) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on acquiring, developing, and managing retail properties in supply-constrained, densely populated markets with high average household incomes and significant barriers to entry. The company operates through two segments: a core REIT portfolio of retail properties held via its Operating Partnership, and an Investment Management platform that manages private-equity-style real estate funds, earning asset management fees and Promote distributions.

products.name: REIT Portfolio
products.description: Ownership and operation of retail real estate properties through the Operating Partnership in high-barrier-to-entry markets.

products.name: Investment Management
products.description: Private-equity-style real estate funds investing in retail properties, earning management fees and Promote distributions from joint ventures.

products.name: Structured Financing Portfolio
products.description: Notes receivable and preferred equity investments collateralized by real estate or ownership interests in property-owning entities.

products.name: Development and Redevelopment
products.description: Construction, expansion, and renovation of retail properties, subject to pre-leasing and financing requirements before commencement.

partnerships.description: Co-investment partners in real estate joint ventures contributing capital alongside Acadia's Investment Management funds.
